review_text: Great park , very secure and close to everything , staff are good and freindly, would def come back to stay

Great level and grassed tent sites was an absolute bonus after spending time in other camp grounds with gravel, unlevel sites. Plenty of trees around which would offer great shade in warmer weather. Dated but clean, neat and tidy amenities block. Well equipped camp kitchen available. Definitely would return.
Great park, staff are awesome 👌

Nous nous sommes arrêtés ici pour deux nuits. Le camping se situe à seulement 30min a pied du centre ville. Le personnel est très accueillant. Le camping est propre et les commodités sont bien entretenu.

Accueil très chaleureux. Les infrastructures ne sont pas neuves, mais ce camping est très bien équipé, très propre et calme et l'accueil est ouvert jusqu'à 18h.
Nous dormions ds notre van.
Good place
Very clean & comfortable.
excellent and quick service, clean amenities, happy staff
Nice place
Great customer service! We booked the wrong day by mistake and he amend it for us despite was already 8pm ! We really appreciate the threat recieved!

We were so disappointed! After reading great reviews our experience just didn’t measure up. We stayed for 2 nights and during that time the toilets/showers were not cleaned at all. They were quite disgusting. Despite the facilities needing to be accessed by a PIN code the door was frequently propped open and people who clearly weren’t staying in the park were using them. At first glance the camp kitchen looked good however didn’t appear to be cleaned at all while we were there and had quite an unpleasant smell of off food, which seemed to be coming from the unemptied bin but impacting the whole area. Despite being quiet during the day the noise from outside the park at night was a lot! Revving cars, motor bikes, dogs barking and people yelling and screaming Not a pleasant experience at all. If it had just been the outside noise I would acknowledge that is beyond the parks control, but the non existent cleaning was really gross.
Always a great park to stay in, clean amenities, great camp kitchen, the team go above and beyond and always with a smile

Very nice atmosphere
Lovely place Alice Springs.
Toilets and showers a bit outdated
But everything was good.
The room was very clean and the cabin is very nice and comfortable.

Amid the ongoing US-Israel-Iran war, a force majeure, this property does not provide full refund for cancellation of booking. Such unprecedented phase are beyond ordinary citizens and tourists control, therefore tourists should not be penalized with a cancellation fee of AUD30 with a pittance refund of AUD19. While we understand the applicability of the property rules was written to avoid unnecessary cancellation, such rules may not have taken into consideration of unprecedented situations like the war affecting the tourism industry including the outage of diesel availability.
I am not sure if the A$30 admin fee is taken to compensate their losses due to the war affecting tourism and refunding tourist pittance A$19 as a gesture.
I would not recommend this park for any advance booking as they have a very strict (rigid) rules on cancellation, which I believe a cancellation due to (possibly) natural disaster would also attracts a cancellation fee of A$30!
Great location, big and clean amenities. Staff were super friendly and helpful.

Maintenance of cabins is very poor.|The cabin was ok, but once you start using things, many are not working.|Hot plate wasn't working at all. Of the reading lights above the bedhead, neither worked. Outside light didn't work.|The kitchen is very poorly equipped. There was no salad bowl at all.|There was not one place/bowl for cereal.|There were 2 flat bigger size plates and 2 small flat plates and that is about it.|I tried the BBQ in the communal area, and it just wasn't heating up. So I gave up after 5 minutes.|We stayed at one of the cabins 3 years ago and it was OK. We will not stay here again.
Molto bene, nessun problema. Reception: ottima accoglienza e supporto.

Stayed here recently, the bathrooms and bbq areas were spotless, the pool was clean and refreshing and the staff were incredibly friendly. The standout for me was the manager Holly, she seemed to be everywhere mowing lawns, chatting to guests, cleaning the pool, cleaning the cabins, very hands on manager. It's nice to see the younger generation taking real pride in their work. You can tell the whole team really cares about their guests. I highly recommend staying at this caravan park if you're visiting Alice Springs! You can even get a beer from reception in a Monday.

We got a free upgrade which was wonderful was fantastic,the pool was clean and  refreshing,the amenities were great,a deposit was required because we had dogs when they properly refunded once we left and they realise there was damage, A little bit out of the way but nothing  too bad, The staff in reception and the cleaner and maintenance guy wonderful and helpful and friendly. Use the amenities to do a load of washing.

Great cabin park with an awesome pool and friendly staff. The staff handled some difficult guests who were yelling and carrying on, they dealt with it calmly and professionally. I was pleased with how well they managed it would stay again 👍

Great experience
No flies
Very friendly crew
Fair price
Nice Campkitchen
Camp site was good,  over all the park was  kept clean  and tidy

We had a powered site for 3 nights. We were quite dissapointed as the "grass" was dead and dry weeds. All the information thay i had found a reviews read said they nice grassy sites. Overall, I don't think that the park is well maintained.

It is a very quiet and secure park and staff were lovely.

We stayed on a powered site for our motor home over the summer holidays. The park is so peaceful with beautiful trees and nice grassy sites for tent campers. Although we didnt need it, the camp kitchen looks well equipped with microwave and fridges. The amenities block is clean and the showers have great pressure and hot water.  Jason is also a friendly and helpful host. Would definitely stay here again even if it was in one of the on site cabins!

BEWARE!!! One Camper lost 2 out of 3 dogs to lethal snake bite while staying at this park. Snakes are active within the park and can be sighted several times per day. These snakes have some of the  most deadly and fast acting venom in Australia, the King Brown or Western Brown Snake Group. Furthermore, these snakes are known to be aggressive and can attack unprovoked. Absolutely not worth risking your life or your loved one’s life to stay here. Book somewhere else!!! Management is down right negligent as they do not warn campers of the snake problem. A disaster waiting to happen.

a nice place to stay, close to most of the attractions in the area.
Staff were very friendly and helpful.
Park is secure by E.A.C.S card for a boom gate when the office hours and gates after hours.
The office has a fair selection of goods that you might need in the way of provisions.
Amenities were centrally located to both parts of the park, they were well maintained and clean.
All in all a pleasurable place to stay.
We stayed on a powered site with our motorhome. We were close to the amenities and kitchen area which made our stay here the favourite so far on our travels.
A lovely park - big sites with lots of shady trees, well maintained. Very secure, walking distance to town. Staff are so helpful

I can't express enough gratitude to Shirley in reception for being so accommodating with our short notice family ensuit cabin.  The cabin was perfect for a great sleep after a VERY long drive.

I 100% recommend staying at Alice Springs Tourist Park.

Ce camping, niché au milieu d'Alice Springs, est tout simplement super ! Calme, les emplacements sont grands, la cuisine, les toilettes et les douches sont parfaitement propres. Le personnel est très sympathique et le prix est abordable. Dommage que la piscine soit fermée mais je ne regrette absolument pas d'avoir choisi ce camping quand même ! Merci pour tout
Quite central to Alice Springs.
We stayed with our camper on a unpowered site and really enjoyed it. Very peaceful, the facilities were very clean, and the staff was super friendly. Highly recommended.
Great park, really good facilities
Great location. We were very happy with the friendly service we  received from Shirley and her partner. Facilities  were clean and tidy . Thankyou
It was nice to stay at the tourist park  last threevweek

We parked a motor home here on a powered site there was plenty of room and very accessible electric, water and grey waste connections and a short walk to the toilet waste, there are plenty of the parks toilets and showers and a covered cooking area.
It's just a couple of minutes drive from Alice Springs town centre. I would use the site again.
3 nights on a powered caravan site , No issues with anything , amenities are kept clean and the bins emptied daily, Camp kitchen was great , good BBQ and sink areas , Very quiet ,
Good caravan park with clean amenities
Lovely reception staff, nice large sites and the bbq area was good. They were able to accommodate us at a very late stage of the day as we had car trouble, highly recommend.

We had a nice quiet site & we met nice people there. We had a deluge on Monday & were impressed that staff checked on people to see that they were okay, especially those in tents.
Have stayed before & would stay again. Would recommend to others as also  convenient to town & bus stop almost at the door!
Great location and great service
Was visiting family and had good recommendations for this park. Travelled with a caravan
Great camping ground and motel cabins near center of town.
Always a great place to stay
Only only gave 2 stars for location because there was a lot of broken glass on the site.

Great spot to stay as close to everything. Upon booking your rig size is asked and seems this is not noticed as some of the bigger vans like us were put on an awkward if not smaller site and more of a slope, making it hard to obtain a level van. The concrete pads on some sites are on the wrong side and is a first in ours years of travels making hard to keep your car parked off the road way.. just something to ask when booking in..
Reception may also want to remind check ins and others of the speed limit especially with kids around.
My fourth stay here in Alice Springs, has always been a pleasant experience. Very clean and tidy.

Good location, great budget offer for cabins, ample sized camp sites, nicely designed and well maintained camp kitchen. Lovely staff!
Cosy atmosphere.
We stayed here for a few days in the middle of our 3 week trip, great location and great amenities.
2nd time we have stayed here. Great caravan park, quiet and well looked after.
Excellent park, amenities are well kept and the staff are great. Very safe and secure.
Camping side very clean and safe.
Great location, quiet except for the noisy air con
Love this place. Stayed here twice now. Well positioned and accommodating for us and welcomes dogs. Great park. We will return when next in Alice springs

Sehr saubere Anlage.
Duschen, Toiletten, Spüle, Waschbecken waren allesamt in sehr gutem Zustand - hier haben wir uns gut aufgehoben gefühlt!

Reception staff not really bothered with interactions with guest. No idea on site sizes and getting bigger vans onto them.
Amenities were ok clean but need an update.
Location is close to town but with that is issues.
Wouldn’t stay agin.

Great location close to the CBD of Alice Springs. We have always found this park to be safe, secure & well maintained. It's a shame that Alice Springs has received such negative publicity, because it is safe & we have never had a problem in all our visits over the last 15 years.
Helpful staff, clean room, great location. We had a motel room which was great.

Easily accessible, friendly & helpful reception staff, very reasonable price, spacious unpowered site, communal camp kitchen with lighting to 10pm, clean and well resourced with BBQ, microwave, toaster, wash up facilities and ability to charge your phones etc.
We, a group of 11 people stayed for 2 weeks. We appreciated the security, the room service and the location. Beds were comfortable. We are planning to come back next year.
Good large caravan sites. Most with grass.management helpfull
Great place to stay with helpful staff
Staff were very friendly and accommodating felt safe nice big sight
A great place to set up camp when in Alice Springs, I would highly recommend a stay here!

Only had a 1 night stay, QB ensuite cabin. It was clean but pretty dated. Shower was nice & hot...but bathroom ceiling needs some TLC. The grill doesn't work very well. We spent about 30 mins trying to toast some cheese & tomato sandwiches....
partially toasted, so we just ate them. We were in and out pretty quickly, so didn't use to much else.

Stayed in a tent site. Can’t rate the place highly enough. Patient, cheerful staff, good, full, clean facilities, good central location, good communication and a pride in the way it’s run. Wish they were all like this.

Stayed in double ensuite cabin. It's 25yrs old and should be replaced. It's very tired, very old, very dirty, cracked lino floor, paint peeling off ceiling, shower head leaks water everywhere. I rang to book on phone only to be told none available, went online straight away and booked it. Like everything else in Alice Springs, horrible and dirty.
Stayed only one night here but the young lady at reception was friendly and helpful and our site was very good with the amenities close by. Very nice stay and would recommend to others
nice clean space. Given a good spot with plenty of room for us and our neighbours. Showers and toilets clean and welcome. laundry good.
Toller Campingplatz!
Lovely park. Very well run with gorgeous staff. Great water pressure in showers with plenty of hot water. Efficiently run. Great Convenience shop with an arrangement of sight seeing brochures.

We stayed in the Motel rooms which were very comfortably fit out, and stayed an even temperature during the heat of the day / cool of the night.  Lovely park with great amenities and very central to Araluen Arts centre.
Lovely caravan park! Quiet, clean and secure. The amenities are first rate! Would definitely recommend. 👌
Convenient location, clean amenities, cheerful staff, and lots of good vibes from the Beanie Festival workers. Seems a little steep for basic unpowered site so might try Showgrounds next time

Great location super friendly staff very helpful They were very accommodating in helping us stay a few more days on the same site so we didn't have to move I'm sure this made a lot of work for Liz the manager but she did it quickly,and seamlessly for us. THANK YOU Liz  and your team, we will stay again next time we pass through Alice Springs. Greg Joyce

Needs to have a fire pit
Good place otherwise
Clean facilities & nice shady site.

We stayed for 2 days on a powered site in our motorhome, with our 2 minature schnauzers. We are travelling through the middle and around the West cost for 3 months. Sites were great with concrete slab and shady trees. I caught up on my washing, and the laundry facilities were very good, only one machine was tap and go, but reception is close and they can help you with $1 coins. Although we have our own bathroom in our MH I wanted to use the amenities to wash my hair. I went in the morning but it was very well used by then and quite dirty with grass/dirt so I waited until the afternoon until they were cleaned before going. The amenities are quite dated but the showers were good with hot water. The park is secured at night and was nice and quiet, and walking into town only took 30mins. The town itself doesn't have much to offer in my opinion, but there is a woolworths and a small but adequate selection of shops in the plaza. FYI the BWS at woolies is closed on Monday and Tuesday and all other days doesn't open until 3pm, but you can purchase a small selection of alcohol from the park reception after 4pm
Great location just on the west side of town. Ammenities were clean and staff friendly. Thanks

We had a powered site for a caravan - 20ft plus towbar We were told it was the last site, yet walking around latter at night there were at least 7 vacant sites including the one we had last time. We were put in a small cul de sac with 6 other caravans … all like us with cars on site and no space for an awning. We had to wait 20 mins while the fellow opposite us backed up, hooked on, asked us to move our car so he had sufficient room to get out!! Not his fault!!  A guy behind us was waiting on us to move as he was told he had to move sites (he wasn’t pleased about it esp looking at the size of our site). Have been here three times but this is our last
Very good position and well equipped with clean showers and toilets. Nice kitchen and bbq area!
Nice Park, Friendly staff, good size sites. Quiet and secure.
Great place and location
Great spot to stay when in Alice Springs. Staff is very friendly, campsite is clean and very safe. Also Dog friendly with a good little shop for some groceries.
We stayed in a caravan site. Pet friendly and close to all amenities clean and tidy.  Staff were lovely. Highly recommended.
Quiet, safe and in a great location close to town.  A great place to stay.

Nice tidy well kept  park managers are very polite & made you feel welcome. Have a convenience shop in office area & can also purchase small amount of alcohol. Cabin was spotless & spacious. Highly recommend this park would gladly stay again
This is a great little caravan and cabin park. It even has a little shop where you can get the basics!
A positive experience from start to finish with staff and management doing all possible to make things great. Very good amenities and only a modest walk to cbd , public transport. & interchange.
Central,quiet,cheap and clean with great staff.
Friendliest and the cleanest Caravan Park in Australia..
Great clean facilities, very secure, easy after hours arrival

We had a great stay only a overnight, cabin was clean ,tidy nice outdoor seating area,the pool was fabulous and the outdoor bbq very clean
The park was quite & well maintained we felt very safe .
site très propre ; correctement équipé, et bien entretenu

Great location right over the road from Art Gallery which had the shuttle bus pick-up and drop off to go to Parttjima every night. Staff were great. The cabin was really clean and heaps of space. Verandah was a bonus. Lots of trees and wildlife. I would stay there again.
Didn't stay in room, but stayed in unpowered site. Was coming in late but staff was very helpful to organise the stay. Area was  well grassed the amenities were spot on an clean would recommend

We had a truly wonderful experience at Alice Springs Tourist Park and can’t recommend it highly enough. From the moment we arrived, the staff were warm, welcoming, and incredibly helpful—they really go out of their way to make guests feel at home. One of the unexpected highlights was their adorable dog, who added such a lovely, friendly vibe to the whole place.

The amenities were spotless—showers, toilets, kitchen areas, all exceptionally clean and well-maintained. It’s clear that the team takes pride in keeping the park in great shape. The pool was a real gem—crystal clear, refreshing, and just what we needed to relax and cool down after long days exploring the area. It’s a perfect spot to unwind, with plenty of space and shade.

One thing that stood out to us was how safe and peaceful we felt the entire time. That sense of security is so important when you’re on the road, and it made our stay even more enjoyable. Another unexpected bonus was that there were very few flies or mosquitos, which can be rare in the Outback. It made hanging out outside in the evenings much more pleasant than we expected.

Stayed here some years back and decided to try it again.  Park is a bit old, but the showers are the best....even better than the discovery park in Adelaide and they charge the earth.  Loved it.  Friendly staff and nothing too much of a hassle.  Safe and secure

We stayed at Alice Springs Tourist Park for a few nights and really enjoyed it. The camping area was lovely and peaceful, with clean and well-maintained facilities. We also loved seeing Tommy Crow’s artwork on display—it added a special local touch. The park is secure with gates locked after sunset, which made us feel safe and relaxed. A great base for exploring Alice Springs!

My go-to place to stay in Alice Springs

Alice Springs Tourist Park is always my first choice when I’m in town. It’s the closest caravan park to the town centre, which makes it really convenient for anything you need; shops, fuel, or a bite to eat. It is walking distance for most people to get your daily steps in.

I stay on the unpowered sites and found them comfortable, with some good shade available depending on the spot. The prices are fair and in line with other parks in the area.

The amenities are clean and well-maintained, and the salt-water pool is a real bonus. The staff are friendly and helpful so just ask them for any advise and they can point you in the right direction. It’s also pet-free, which adds to the peaceful vibe and no droppings. I hope you enjoy the Tommy Crow paintings you will see there.

All up, it’s a reliable and comfortable place to stay, and I’ll definitely keep coming back.
Great safe place to stay in alice. Was really clean and had all we needed. Camp kitchen was great and same with bathroom showers. Would highly recommend.
Check in process was great
Good place to stay. Well maintained facilities.
Amazing place to stay. Friendly staff, clean facilities and very peaceful place with lots of bird life
Great location for a stay. Fair pricing. Television channels dont always work the greatest. Friendly staff.

Staff are super friendly and helpful. Stayed in the uncovered camp section and found a nice shady spot to relax in the afternoon.
Feels safe and secure and very very peaceful
Übernachtet mit RV - sauber, freundlicher Service, erfrischender Pool, gerne wieder!

ウルルの最後の大きな都市で
キャラバンで利用させてもらいました

シャワーや冷蔵庫は問題なく使えました

ハエや蚊などは思ったよりいなかったです
Wi-Fiも十分に使えました

セキュリティもしっかりしており
プールなどもありました

We blew into Alice after 25 days on the road and camping in a small tent. We took a cabin with ensuite at the Tourist Park and it was heaven. The cabin, a little on the old side was clean and comfortable having everything one would need. The staff were amazingly helpful and friendly, the park quiet and very conveniently located. We will happily return.

We stayed at this lovely park for 4 nights on a powered caravan site. We had a lovely shady site, with native birds visiting constantly. The amenities block appeared a little dated, however, toilets were kept immaculate andvthe showers were nice with great water pressure and temperature. Close enough to the shops but far enough out from the centre of town to avoid any ofvthe recent troubles in Alice

Quiet, clean and good security…good base to visit area …or just passing thro’
Good laundry and bathroom facilities…great facilities in camp kitchen…dog friendly too
Did not stay in room…camper trailer
What a beautifully maintained caravan park.  the amenities are clean and plentiful. Great value

Ein Campingpark mit allem was man braucht. Grillstation Duschen, kleines Lädchen. Kleiner Spielplatz direkt neben Einem Pool. Strom und Wasser an jeder Stellfläche. Und wer mit dem Auto kommt  kann auch kleine Häuschen mieten.

This is not just a caravan park. These are people who go their way to help you n make sure you are looked after. During Alice Beanie Festival, I have no car, Cyril drove me to Desert Park and Liz the Manager picked me up on  her day off after I walked on this amazing park. I 'll be back. Thku very much. Florie xx

Solo traveler and rented a powered site. I found the staff friendly and helpful. Camp kitchen and amenities were clean working. Proximity to town and attractions was good. Good value, would stay again.

Low key, walk to Todd Mall, friendly team.
Can mind your car or van if needed
A favourite

Central location for shopping, and easy access to East and West McDonald ranges.
Booked ahead on line, and on arrival we were allocated a site, but were given the opportunity to use a drive through site if we wanted.
The allocated site was very narrow, and there were some drive through sites available. So took the easy drive through site instead.
Staff advised us to lock everything away at night, and ensure doors kept lock.

The amenities are clean, but aged.

Staff were friendly and helpful during my stay...cabins are nothing flash... however they are clean and have the basics that you require such as fridge...microwave...cooktop with small oven...cooling and heating...free Wi-Fi however due to the park being so busy with Finke Desert Race Wi-Fi was lacking...if you do not have transport you will require a taxi to get around as walking into the town to shop etc. will take about 30 minutes...during the day not really a problem if you like walking however at night I would not advise it for safety reasons...once dark the gates to the park are locked and access only available with your key tag to swipe when entering and leaving the park...yaye's cafe is directly across the road along with an amazing art gallery....craft shop and other sites to see...down further around the corner is the cemetery where Albert Namatjira is laid to rest a well-known indigenous painter of beautiful landscapes...Alice Springs Tourist Park is very relaxed atmosphere...everyone seems to respect others and noise issues were not a problem...the park has an enclosed playground and a swimming pool...various grocery items can be purchased in the front reception along with various other items...there are also showering blocks...outdoor community kitchen...laundry room...I look forward to returning here in 2026 for my next trip...
Great place to stop.will use again.

People and staff very  friendly.
Amenities so clean .
Creat place to stay.
So many places to visit  are lot are free. Dogs allowed.

This camp site was the best, I had a spacious area, on walking distance to the great and clean amenities, all for free included in affordable prices. Their camp kitchen was fantastic, and cozy with cover, tables and chairs to meet others around mealtime. Very friendly and helpful staff, and incredibly clean and welcoming. I went to the Cultural precinct just on the other side of the road, and took the shuttle bus by night to the Parrtjima festival in the Desert Park. A safe comfortable base, thank you for everything 🫶♥️🚗⛺️
Great, clean, safe campsite with brilliant kitchen facilities ( toaster, kettle, fridge, tostie maker, bbq and gas rings.

Spent 2 nights in a Cabin, Double bed, own kitchen, bathroom.. front porch.
very quiet, nice stop.. swimming pool was welcoming after a long hot trip..
will definitely be back..👍👍👍

the place is also gated, so very good security..
Very impressed with the staff so helpfull during my 3 weeks FIFO Worker
Duschen und Toiletten sehr sauber.

Bit of a mix of feelings for this place. ||Stayed a good few nights here and the site is mature and relatively clean. |Pool looked good although didn’t use it. ||Had a challenge with booking additional nights with the receptionist putting in the wrong credit card numbers causing our card to be blocked, but it was sorted eventually. ||The toilets and showers could do with modernising and the shower curtains need binning! Foul. ||Finally, not a fan of the hand painted 70s signs but otherwise it’s got loads of potential and I’m sure will bloom into a great looking outfit in the years to come.
Very welcoming place  ! Clean camping and kitchen in the Northern Territory
Clean toilets and showers, great and not to busy

We booked a family cabin for 4 nights, friendly staff, cabin was clean, bathroom was very small with nowhere to hang anything, parked next to cabin, entrance to park was gated at night, used the park laundry facilities a few times, wifi was not good.|
A great place.
The cabins are always nice and clean and comfy.
Loved this park, plenty of shady spots, great stocked store and felt safe due to 8ft high security gates

This is a very clean and well run park. The facilities are a bit old and tired, but they are cleaned and maintained well. The bathrooms are excellent and the camp kitchen had clean tea towels, sponges and washing up liquid. My main bug is the unpowered sites were small and cramped in like sardines as the rest of the park appeared to be. Not a fancy park, but we’ll run for what it is.
Great park...good amenities and great staff...
Powered site for 1 night. Very nice facility's and laundry. Recomend and will visit again.
Always helpful and very clean cabins
Lovely place to stay in Alice Springs, nice cabins with enough room for a family, good kitchen and good supplies. Their reception office sells general supplies and cold drinks, friendly staff.
Very good layout. Clean amenities. Reception staff was very helpful and friendly.

This park is well looked after, camp sites are well appointed to ammenities, camp kitchen was clean and well maintained and great facilities. Amenities and family cabins are dated but clean, laundry & dryers are fantastic. Great location to town. Staff are the highlight of our trip from house keeping to grounds staff, reception you name it, friendly, accommodating, easy going it really made our stay good to excellent!
I am currently staying here and loving it! The staff are amazing. So friendly. So welcoming. Thank you.

What a lovely place! We booked last minute to stay here one night and ended up extending our stay. The staff are lovely. Stefania was super attentive, welcoming and we loved her way to communicate with us! The owner tried to do her best to let us stay one more night as they were fully booked that night. She made our stay so special and we almost felt at home!
Very helpful people there!! We’ll never be more thankful!!! Did so many washing and dryers after such a long trip. Laundry is well equipped with washing machines and dryers. Toilets are cleaned every day and the kitchen is amazing! 10/10.
Grassed areas with lots of trees and lovely birds.
The place is super safe and sicure!!!!
Looking forward to seeing you soon! Thank you again for everything!
Silvia and Giulio
A lovely quiet place to stay.  Close to town.  Security gates so we felt totally safe.
